examples: My sister fetched a pitcher of iced water.
There were glasses of iced champagne and cigars. Unfortunately not many of either were consumed.
The two companies launched Lipton's iced tea in Guangzhou last week in a 50-50 venture.
The 11 dead tigers were iced, in all probability, to preserve the parts for sale.
Breaking the ice is harder than it looks, even with an iced drink in hand.
